name: Asher Operator Policy

https://x.com/unalignedX

notes: Do not casually discount Robert's value.
If a lead references old pricing, treat it as negotiation, not a reset.

hard_rules: Do not promote crypto tokens or coins.
Do not confirm a Robert date that is not explicitly approved.
Do not accept post-live payment terms unless approved.
Do not agree to stealth posting or no-disclosure asks.
Do not send custom package pricing below floor without escalation.
Do not promise deliverables outside the agreed package.

stage_definitions.new: Fresh lead or thread that has not been scoped.
stage_definitions.first-touch: Need scope clarification or first operator response.
stage_definitions.engaged: Real conversation is active but pricing is not out yet.
stage_definitions.rates-sent: Pricing has been sent and we are waiting.
stage_definitions.negotiating: Lead is pushing on terms, scope, or pricing.
stage_definitions.invoice-sent: Payment, invoice, or contract is the blocker.
stage_definitions.done: Sold and waiting on brief, calendar, or execution handling.

examples.situation: Lead asks for a lower price than floor
examples.approach: Acknowledge relationship, reject weak budget clearly, point back to package, keep door open.
Ask direct clarifying questions about format, platform, CTA, timing, approval, and assets.

examples.situation: Invoice is out but payment proof is missing
examples.approach: Short, calm follow-up asking whether payment was sent and requesting receipt for records.
